steps.title: Use the historical contrast
steps.content: The first sentence says traffic signals did not always have red, yellow, and green lights. The second says that before the 1920s they only had red and green lights, so the blank must mean "included" or "contained."

steps.title: Choose the fitting verb
steps.content: A and D wrongly suggest avoiding or ignoring the lights. C describes admiration or value, which does not fit lifeless traffic signals. The word meaning "included as a feature" completes the sentence. The answer is B.
